name: Fiscal Year Q1 Alignment
description: Q1 covers January through March. Queries referencing Q1 must filter order_date between Jan 1 and Mar 31.

name: Fiscal Year Q2 Alignment
description: Q2 covers April through June.

name: Fiscal Year Q3 Alignment
description: Q3 covers July through September.

name: Fiscal Year Q4 Alignment
description: Q4 covers October through December.

name: Default 2-Year Retention Window
description: Operational queries default to last 2 years unless a specific date range is supplied.

name: Historical Archive Beyond 2 Years Requires Approval
description: Queries accessing data older than 2 years must be flagged for data governance review.

name: Weekend Orders Excluded from B2B Metrics
description: B2B revenue metrics exclude orders placed on Saturday or Sunday.

name: End-of-Month Cutoff for Revenue Recognition
description: Revenue is recognised on the last day of the month in which the order was delivered.
condition: revenue_date = DATE_TRUNC('month', delivered_date) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day'

name: Hourly Metrics Use UTC Timestamps
description: All hourly aggregations must use UTC to prevent daylight saving distortions.

name: Last Week Defined as 7 Rolling Days
description: 'Last week' means the 7 calendar days ending yesterday, not the prior Monday-Sunday period.
condition: order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' AND order_date < CURRENT_DATE

name: Last Month Defined as Prior Calendar Month
description: 'Last month' means the complete prior calendar month, not the last 30 rolling days.
condition: order_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 day'

name: YTD Uses Calendar Year Start
description: Year-to-date begins January 1 of the current year.

name: Seasonality Peak: November-December
description: Revenue metrics in November and December should be annotated with seasonality flag.

name: Black Friday Week Exclusion from Average Calculations
description: Black Friday week (last week of November) is excluded from average order value baselines.

name: Leap Year Day Handling
description: February 29 orders are attributed to March 1 for monthly aggregation in non-leap years.
condition: CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date)=2 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM order_date)=29 THEN DATE_TRUNC('month',order_date) + INTERVAL '1 month' END

name: Data Freshness SLA: Orders within 5 Minutes
description: Order data must be no more than 5 minutes stale for real-time dashboards.

name: Analytics Snapshot Refreshed Daily at 02:00 UTC
description: The daily_metrics table is refreshed once per day at 02:00 UTC. Intraday queries may be stale.

name: Invoice Aging: 30/60/90 Day Buckets
description: Overdue invoices are grouped into 30, 60, and 90-day aging buckets for AR reporting.

name: Payroll Processed on Last Business Day of Month
description: Salary records dated after the last business day of the month are flagged for review.

name: Subscription Billing Cycle Alignment
description: Monthly subscriptions bill on the same calendar day each month.
condition: EXTRACT(DAY FROM billing_date) = EXTRACT(DAY FROM start_date)

name: Campaign Attribution Window: 30 Days
description: Revenue is attributed to a campaign only if the order was placed within 30 days of the last click.

name: Contract Renewal 90-Day Notice Window
description: Contracts expiring within 90 days are flagged for renewal actions.
condition: end_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '90 days'

name: Leave Records Must Not Overlap
description: An employee may not have two approved leave records with overlapping dates.
condition: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM leave_records l2 WHERE l2.employee_id=l.employee_id AND l2.start_date <= l.end_date AND l2.end_date >= l.start_date AND l2.leave_id != l.leave_id)

name: Discount Validity Window Enforced
description: Discounts may only be applied within their valid_from and valid_to dates.

name: Price History Effective Date Logic
description: A product's active price is the most recent price_history record prior to the order date.

name: Performance Review Annual Cycle
description: Each employee must have exactly one annual review per calendar year.
condition: COUNT(*) = 1 WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM review_date) = target_year

name: Forecast Period Cannot Exceed 12 Months Forward
description: Forecast horizon is capped at 12 months to maintain reliability.

name: Reorder Lead Time Buffer: 5 Days
description: Reorder triggers fire when stock will reach zero within lead_time_days + 5 buffer days.

name: Audit Logs Retained for 7 Years
description: Audit log entries must not be deleted until 7 years after creation.

name: Session Timeout After 30 Minutes of Inactivity
description: Web sessions inactive for more than 30 minutes are marked as ended.

name: Quote Validity Period: 30 Days
description: Sales quotes expire 30 days after creation unless renewed.

name: Payment Plan Duration Capped at 24 Months
description: Instalment plans may not exceed 24 months in total duration.

name: Loyalty Points Expire After 12 Months
description: Loyalty points not redeemed within 12 months of issuance are automatically expired.

name: Asset Depreciation Calculated Monthly
description: Asset depreciation is charged on the first day of each month.

name: Vendor Invoice Payment Terms: Net 30
description: Default vendor payment terms are Net 30 days from invoice date.

name: Credit Note Expiry: 6 Months
description: Store credit notes expire 6 months after issuance.

name: Support Ticket SLA: 24 Hours for High Priority
description: High-priority support tickets must be resolved within 24 hours.
condition: resolved_date <= created_date + INTERVAL '24 hours' WHERE priority='High'

name: Support Ticket SLA: 72 Hours for Medium Priority
description: Medium-priority tickets must be resolved within 72 hours.
condition: resolved_date <= created_date + INTERVAL '72 hours' WHERE priority='Medium'

name: Return Window: 30 Days from Delivery
description: Product returns are only accepted within 30 days of the delivery date.

name: Cohort Analysis Minimum 90-Day Observation Period
description: Cohort retention metrics require at least 90 days of data after cohort acquisition date.

name: Alaska Tax Exemption
description: Orders shipped to Alaska are exempt from state sales tax.

name: Hawaii Tax Exemption
description: Orders shipped to Hawaii are exempt from certain federal taxes.

name: Valid Sales Regions Only
description: Order regions must be one of: North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Latin America.

name: EU GDPR: Personal Data Must Stay in EU
description: Customer PII for EU-region customers must not be transferred outside the EU data centre.

name: UK Post-Brexit Customs Charges
description: Orders delivered to the UK from non-UK suppliers incur additional customs duty.
condition: customs_duty_applied = TRUE WHERE destination_country = 'UK' AND supplier_country != 'UK'

name: North America Currency: USD
description: All North America region transactions must be denominated in USD.

name: Europe Region Currency: EUR or GBP
description: Europe region transactions may use EUR or GBP.

name: Asia Pacific Currency: Local or USD
description: Asia Pacific transactions may use local currency or USD as reporting currency.

name: Latin America Withholding Tax
description: Payments to Latin American suppliers require 15% withholding tax deduction.

name: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
description: California customers have the right to opt out of data sales. Their records must be flagged.

name: Canada GST/HST Applicable
description: Orders delivered to Canada incur GST/HST at the applicable provincial rate.

name: Australia GST: 10%
description: Orders delivered to Australia include 10% GST.

name: India GST Slab Rates
description: Indian orders apply GST at 5%, 12%, 18%, or 28% based on product category.

name: Germany VAT: 19%
description: Orders to Germany apply 19% VAT (7% for food/books).

name: France VAT: 20%
description: Standard French VAT rate is 20%.

name: Brazil ICMS Tax
description: Brazilian orders incur ICMS interstate commerce tax.

name: Sanctioned Countries: Blocked Transactions
description: Transactions to/from OFAC-sanctioned countries are automatically blocked.

name: Free Trade Zone Duty Exemption
description: Products shipped through designated free trade zones are exempt from import duty.

name: Regional Shipping Zones Define Carrier Routing
description: Each geographic region has a designated carrier and shipping zone mapping.
condition: carrier IN (SELECT carrier FROM shipping_zone_map WHERE region=o.region)

name: APAC Import Restrictions: Electronics
description: Electronics shipped to certain APAC countries require CE/FCC certification documentation.
condition: certification_verified = TRUE WHERE region='Asia Pacific' AND product_category='Electronics'

name: Cross-Border Currency Conversion Tolerance
description: Currency conversions must use exchange rates within 0.5% of the mid-market rate.

name: MENA Region VAT: 5–15%
description: Middle East and North Africa orders apply VAT between 5% and 15%.

name: Africa Region Payment Methods Restricted
description: Only mobile money and bank transfer are accepted for Africa region orders.
condition: payment_method IN ('Mobile Money','Bank Transfer') WHERE region='Africa'

name: Southeast Asia Cash on Delivery Allowed
description: SEA region supports cash-on-delivery as an accepted payment method.
condition: payment_method = 'Cash on Delivery' WHERE region='Southeast Asia'

name: North America Free Shipping Threshold: $50
description: Orders over $50 to North America qualify for free standard shipping.
condition: shipping_cost = 0 WHERE region='North America' AND total_amount >= 50

name: Electronics: Warranty Mandatory
description: All electronics products must have an active manufacturer warranty on record.

name: Food: Expiry Date Required
description: Food and beverage products must have a non-null expiry date.
condition: expiry_date IS NOT NULL WHERE category IN ('Food','Food & Beverages')

name: Furniture: Oversized Shipping Surcharge
description: Furniture items weighing over 30kg incur a $50 oversized shipping surcharge.

name: Health & Beauty: Age Verification for Certain Products
description: Certain health products require customer age verification (18+).
condition: age_verified = TRUE WHERE category='Health & Beauty' AND age_restricted=TRUE

name: Sports Equipment: CE Marking Required for EU
description: Sports equipment sold in Europe must carry CE marking.
condition: ce_certified = TRUE WHERE category='Sports' AND region='Europe'

name: Books: Zero VAT Rate in UK/Ireland
description: Printed books and eBooks are zero-rated for VAT in the UK and Ireland.
condition: tax_rate = 0 WHERE category='Books' AND destination_country IN ('UK','Ireland')

name: Electronics: High-Value Items Require Signature on Delivery
description: Electronics with unit price > $500 require a delivery signature.
condition: signature_required = TRUE WHERE category='Electronics' AND price > 500

name: Clothing: Size Availability Prevents Zero-Stock Listing
description: Clothing products with zero stock in all sizes must be set to inactive.
condition: is_active = FALSE WHERE category='Clothing' AND total_stock_all_sizes = 0

name: Toys: ASTM Safety Standard Compliance
description: Toys must comply with ASTM F963 safety standards (US) or EN71 (EU).

name: Electronics: Lithium Battery Restrictions on Air Freight
description: Products containing lithium batteries cannot be shipped via air freight in certain configurations.
condition: shipping_method != 'Air' WHERE category='Electronics' AND contains_lithium_battery=TRUE AND battery_wh > 100

name: Furniture: Assembly Instructions Required
description: Flat-pack furniture products must include assembly instructions in the product record.
condition: assembly_instructions_url IS NOT NULL WHERE category='Furniture' AND requires_assembly=TRUE

name: Software: License Key Required on Purchase
description: Software products must generate a license key upon order completion.
condition: license_key IS NOT NULL WHERE category='Software'

name: Electronics: Returns Accepted for 30 Days (DOA Policy)
description: Electronics returned as Dead on Arrival (DOA) within 7 days get immediate replacement.
condition: return_type = 'DOA Replacement' WHERE category='Electronics' AND return_date <= order_date + 7

name: Food: Temperature-Controlled Shipping Required
description: Perishable food items require temperature-controlled (cold chain) shipping.
condition: cold_chain = TRUE WHERE category='Food & Beverages' AND perishable=TRUE

name: Health Supplements: FDA Disclaimer Required
description: Health supplement product descriptions must include FDA disclaimer text.
condition: fda_disclaimer IS NOT NULL WHERE category='Health & Beauty' AND supplement=TRUE

name: Luxury Goods: Authentication Certificate Required
description: Luxury items over $1000 must include a certificate of authenticity.
condition: auth_certificate IS NOT NULL WHERE price > 1000 AND luxury=TRUE

name: Electronics: Recycling Fee Applied in Applicable States
description: Electronics sales in California, Connecticut, and Maryland incur a recycling fee.
condition: recycling_fee_applied = TRUE WHERE category='Electronics' AND state IN ('California','Connecticut','Maryland')

name: Alcohol: Legal Age Verification Required
description: Alcohol products require buyer age verification (21+ in US, 18+ in EU).

name: Prescription Items: Pharmacist Approval Required
description: Prescription health products cannot be dispatched without pharmacist sign-off.
condition: pharmacist_approved = TRUE WHERE category='Health & Beauty' AND prescription_required=TRUE

name: Digital Products: No Return Policy
description: Digital/downloadable products are non-returnable once downloaded.
condition: return_eligible = FALSE WHERE product_type='Digital' AND download_completed=TRUE

name: Platinum Tier: Minimum 20% Discount Eligibility
description: Platinum customers qualify for at least 20% discount on all orders.

name: Enterprise Tier: Dedicated Account Manager Required
description: Every Enterprise customer must have an assigned account manager (employee).
condition: account_manager_id IS NOT NULL WHERE customer_tier = 'Enterprise'

name: Bronze Tier: No Free Shipping Below $100
description: Bronze tier customers do not receive free shipping on orders under $100.

name: Gold Tier: Priority Customer Support
description: Gold and above tier customers receive priority queue in support ticket routing.

name: Silver Tier Spend Threshold: $500 - $2000 Lifetime
description: Silver status requires lifetime spend between $500 and $2000.

name: Enterprise SLA: 99.9% Uptime Guarantee
description: Enterprise customers have a contractual 99.9% platform uptime SLA.

name: Inactive Customer: No Order in 180 Days
description: Customers with no orders in the last 180 days are classified as inactive.

name: VIP Customer: Top 1% by Revenue
description: VIP designation applies to customers in the top 1% of revenue contribution.

name: New Customer: First 90 Days
description: A customer is classified as new for 90 days after their first order.

name: B2B Customer: Company Email Domain Required
description: Business customers must have a non-consumer email domain.
condition: email NOT LIKE '%@gmail.com' AND email NOT LIKE '%@yahoo.com' WHERE customer_type='B2B'

name: Churned Customer: Cancelled Subscription + No Orders 60 Days
description: A customer is churned if their subscription is cancelled and no new order in 60 days.
condition: subscription_status='cancelled' AND last_order_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days'

name: High-Risk Customer: 3+ Chargebacks
description: Customers with 3 or more chargebacks in 12 months are flagged as high-risk.

name: Loyal Customer Minimum: 5 Orders in 12 Months
description: Loyal status requires at least 5 completed orders in the past 12 months.

name: Enterprise Tier: Custom Contract Pricing
description: Enterprise customers use contract-negotiated pricing, not the public price list.

name: Tier Upgrade Trigger: $5000 Lifetime Spend for Gold
description: Silver customers automatically upgrade to Gold upon reaching $5000 lifetime spend.

name: Tier Upgrade: $20000 for Platinum
description: Gold customers upgrade to Platinum upon reaching $20000 lifetime spend.

name: B2C Customer: Maximum 50 Units Per SKU Per Order
description: B2C customers cannot order more than 50 units of a single SKU in one order.

name: Enterprise Tier: Net 45 Payment Terms
description: Enterprise customers have Net 45 payment terms instead of standard Net 30.
condition: due_date = invoice_date + INTERVAL '45 days' WHERE customer_tier = 'Enterprise'

name: Student Discount: 15% on Education Category
description: Verified students receive 15% discount on Education category products.

name: Subscriber Customers: Early Access to Sales
description: Active subscribers get 24-hour early access to promotional events.
condition: sale_access_date = public_sale_date - INTERVAL '24 hours' WHERE subscription_status = 'active'

name: Revenue Recognition: ASC 606 Compliance
description: Revenue is recognised when performance obligation is satisfied (delivery confirmed).

name: Maximum Discount: 40% Without CFO Approval
description: Discounts exceeding 40% require CFO-level approval.

name: Gross Margin Floor: 20%
description: Orders must not be processed if gross margin falls below 20%.

name: Commission Rate: 5% of Net Revenue for Sales Reps
description: Sales representatives earn 5% commission on net revenue from orders they close.
condition: commission = net_revenue * 0.05 WHERE rep_id IS NOT NULL

name: Budget Variance Alert at 10% Overspend
description: A budget alert fires when actual spend exceeds allocation by more than 10%.

name: Expense Reimbursement Cap: $500 Without Manager Approval
description: Individual expense claims over $500 require line-manager approval.

name: Accounts Receivable: Write-Off After 180 Days
description: Invoices unpaid after 180 days are written off as bad debt.
condition: bad_debt_flag = TRUE WHERE status='Overdue' AND CURRENT_DATE - due_date > 180

name: Transfer Pricing: Arms-Length Standard
description: Intercompany transactions must be priced at arms-length market rates.

name: Minimum Invoice Amount: $1
description: Invoices must have a total_amount greater than zero.

name: Revenue Reported in Functional Currency
description: All revenue metrics must be converted to and reported in USD (functional currency).

name: Vendor Payment: Early Pay Discount 2/10 Net 30
description: Vendors offering 2/10 net 30 terms: 2% discount if paid within 10 days.
condition: early_pay_discount = 0.02 WHERE payment_date <= invoice_date + INTERVAL '10 days'

name: Refund Issued Within 5 Business Days
description: Approved refunds must be processed and credited within 5 business days.

name: Royalty Fee: 3% on Licensed Products
description: Orders containing licensed products incur a 3% royalty payable to the licensor.

name: Capex vs Opex Classification Threshold: $2500
description: Asset purchases above $2500 are capitalised (Capex); below are expensed (Opex).
condition: classification = CASE WHEN purchase_value >= 2500 THEN 'Capex' ELSE 'Opex' END

name: Intercompany Eliminations in Consolidated Reports
description: Intercompany revenues and costs must be eliminated in group-level reporting.

name: Net Revenue = Gross Revenue - Returns - Discounts
description: Net revenue calculation must subtract all returns and applied discounts.

name: Sales Tax Remittance: Monthly Filing
description: Sales tax collected must be remitted to tax authorities on a monthly basis.

name: Expense Category: Travel Cap $5000 Per Employee Per Quarter
description: Travel expenses per employee cannot exceed $5000 per quarter without VP approval.

name: Accrual Accounting: Recognise Expenses When Incurred
description: Expenses are recognised in the period incurred, not when paid.

name: Bad Debt Provision: 2% of Overdue AR
description: A 2% provision for bad debts is applied against the overdue accounts receivable balance.

name: Order Total Amount Must Be Positive
description: Every order record must have a total_amount greater than zero.

name: Customer Email Format Validation
description: Customer email must match standard RFC 5322 email format.

name: Order Date Cannot Be in the Future
description: Order dates must not exceed the current timestamp.

name: Customer ID Referential Integrity
description: Every order.customer_id must reference an existing customers record.
condition: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE customer_id = o.customer_id)

name: Product Price Must Be Non-Negative
description: Product price cannot be negative.

name: Stock Quantity Cannot Be Negative
description: Stock quantity on hand must be zero or positive.

name: Duplicate Order Detection
description: Two orders from the same customer within 5 minutes with the same total_amount are flagged as potential duplicates.
condition: NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.customer_id=o.customer_id AND o2.total_amount=o.total_amount AND ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM o2.order_date-o.order_date)) < 300 AND o2.order_id != o.order_id)

name: Employee Hire Date Cannot Be in the Future
description: An employee's hire_date must be today or earlier.

name: Invoice Total = Subtotal + Tax
description: Invoice total_amount must equal subtotal plus tax_amount.

name: Order Item Line Total Validation
description: line_total must equal unit_price * quantity * (1 - discount_pct).

name: Performance Review Score Range: 1.0 to 5.0
description: Performance review scores must be between 1.0 and 5.0 inclusive.

name: Supplier Rating Range: 0 to 5
description: Supplier ratings must be between 0 and 5.

name: Discount Percentage Range: 0% to 100%
description: Discount percentages must be between 0 and 1 (inclusive).

name: Product Cost Must Be Less Than Price
description: A product's cost must not exceed its selling price.

name: Unique Customer Email Constraint
description: No two active customers may share the same email address.
condition: COUNT(*) = 1 GROUP BY email WHERE is_active = TRUE

name: Shipment Weight Must Be Positive
description: Shipment weight_kg must be greater than zero.

name: Budget Allocated Amount Must Be Positive
description: Budget line allocations must be greater than zero.

name: Leave Days Taken Must Match Date Range
description: days_taken must equal (end_date - start_date) + 1.

name: Cohort Size Must Be Positive
description: Every cohort record must have a cohort_size greater than zero.

name: Retention Rates Must Be Between 0 and 1
description: Cohort retention rates (week 1, 4, 12) must be between 0 and 1.
condition: retention_week_1 BETWEEN 0 AND 1 AND retention_week_4 BETWEEN 0 AND 1 AND retention_week_12 BETWEEN 0 AND 1

name: PII: Customer Email Must Not Appear in SELECT Without Aggregation
description: Queries selecting raw customer email addresses are blocked without an explicit PII override flag.
condition: SELECT must not include customers.email without hashing or aggregation

name: PII: Full Customer Name Not Exposed in API Responses
description: Customer full names are masked to first name + last initial in API responses.

name: SOX: Revenue Records Immutable After Month Close
description: Sarbanes-Oxley compliance: revenue records for closed periods cannot be modified.

name: Audit Trail: All Data Modifications Logged
description: Every INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE on customer, order, invoice tables must create an audit_log entry.

name: GDPR: Right to Erasure Within 30 Days
description: Customer deletion requests under GDPR must be fulfilled within 30 days.

name: PCI-DSS: Card Numbers Never Stored in Plain Text
description: Payment card numbers must be tokenised; plain text card numbers are prohibited.
condition: card_number IS NULL OR card_number = tokenised_value

name: Access Control: Finance Reports Restricted to Finance Role
description: Endpoints returning EBITDA, payroll, or budget data are restricted to users with the Finance role.

name: HR Data: Salary Visible Only to HR and Employee
description: Individual salary figures are only visible to HR staff or the employee themselves.

name: HIPAA: Health Data Encrypted at Rest
description: Health-category product purchase data is classified as sensitive and must be encrypted at rest.

name: FCPA: Gifts and Entertainment Cap $250
description: Gifts or entertainment provided to government officials must not exceed $250.
condition: amount <= 250 WHERE expense_category = 'Gifts & Entertainment' AND recipient_type = 'Government'

name: Anti-Money Laundering: Transactions Over $10000 Reported
description: Transactions over $10,000 trigger a SAR (Suspicious Activity Report) filing requirement.

name: Data Retention: Transactional Records 7 Years
description: Financial transaction records must be retained for a minimum of 7 years.
condition: NOT deleted WHERE transaction_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 years'

name: Employee Data: Retention 3 Years Post-Employment
description: Employee records must be retained for 3 years after the last date of employment.
condition: NOT deleted WHERE termination_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 years'

name: ePrivacy: Marketing Emails Require Opt-In
description: Marketing notification sends require customer_consent = TRUE.

name: ISO 27001: Security Incidents Logged Within 1 Hour
description: Any security incident must be logged in the audit trail within 60 minutes of detection.

name: Revenue Uses SUM Aggregation
description: Total revenue must always use SUM, never AVG or COUNT.

name: Average Order Value Uses AVG Aggregation
description: AOV must use AVG(total_amount), not SUM/COUNT.

name: Customer Count Uses COUNT DISTINCT
description: Customer count must use COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) to avoid double-counting.

name: Ratio Metrics: Denominator Must Be Non-Zero
description: All ratio calculations must use NULLIF(denominator, 0) to prevent division by zero.
condition: NULLIF(denominator, 0) IS USED in ratio calculations

name: Minimum Sample Size for Averages: 10 Records
description: Average metrics should not be reported when the sample size is below 10.

name: Percentile Metrics Require Minimum 100 Records
description: P50/P95/P99 latency or value metrics require at least 100 records.

name: Churn Rate Denominator: Start-of-Period Customer Count
description: Churn rate uses the start-of-period customer count as the denominator, not end-of-period.

name: Revenue Per Region Excludes Inter-Region Transfers
description: Region-level revenue aggregations must exclude internal transfer orders.

name: Rolling 12-Month LTV Calculation
description: Customer LTV is calculated over a rolling 12-month window.

name: Gross Margin Uses ROUND to 2 Decimal Places
description: Gross margin percentages are rounded to 2 decimal places.

name: Daily Metrics Aggregated at Day Granularity
description: Daily KPI snapshots must aggregate at calendar day boundaries (midnight UTC).

name: Revenue Trending: Align Periods Year-over-Year
description: YoY trend comparisons must use same calendar period (same weeks, same days).

name: Headcount Reported as Full-Time Equivalents (FTE)
description: Part-time employees counted at 0.5 FTE; full-time at 1.0 FTE.
condition: fte_count = SUM(CASE WHEN employment_type='Full-Time' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.5 END)

name: Campaign ROI Rounded to 1 Decimal Place
description: ROAS and campaign ROI figures are rounded to 1 decimal place.

name: Cohort Metrics Require Full Cohort Period Elapsed
description: Week-12 retention is only computed after 84 days have elapsed since cohort_date.

name: Role: Admin Has Full Read/Write Access
description: Admin users have unrestricted read and write access to all entities.

name: Role: Analyst Has Read-Only Access
description: Analyst users can only execute SELECT queries; no INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE.

name: Role: Sales Rep Can Only View Own Customers
description: Sales reps can only query customers assigned to their rep_id.

name: Role: Finance Can Access Budget and Payroll
description: Finance role grants access to BUDGET_ITEM, SALARY, EXPENSE, and ACCOUNT tables.
condition: user_role = 'Finance' GRANTS SELECT ON budget_items, salaries, expenses, accounts

name: Role: HR Can Access Employee and Salary Data
description: HR role grants read access to EMPLOYEE, SALARY, LEAVE_RECORD, and PERFORMANCE_REVIEW tables.
condition: user_role = 'HR' GRANTS SELECT ON employees, salaries, leave_records, performance_reviews

name: Sensitive Fields: Masked in Non-Admin Roles
description: Fields marked sensitive (SSN, DOB, bank account) are masked to asterisks for non-Admin roles.

name: API Rate Limit: 1000 Requests Per Minute Per Key
description: Each API key is rate-limited to 1000 requests per minute.

name: Multi-Factor Authentication Required for Admin Role
description: All Admin users must authenticate with MFA before accessing sensitive endpoints.

name: IP Allowlist: Internal Dashboards Restricted to Corporate Network
description: Internal analytics dashboards are only accessible from IP ranges 10.0.0.0/8 and 192.168.0.0/16.

name: Session Token Expiry: 8 Hours
description: API session tokens expire after 8 hours of inactivity.

name: Read Access to Support Tickets: Assigned Agent or Admin
description: Support tickets are only visible to the assigned agent or Admin users.

name: Export Restrictions: Bulk Data Export Requires Manager Approval
description: Exporting more than 10,000 rows requires manager sign-off.

name: Vendor Data: Visible Only to Procurement Role
description: Supplier pricing, contracts, and vendor invoices are restricted to the Procurement role.

name: Customer PII: GDPR-Restricted Regions Use Separate DB
description: EU customer PII is stored in the EU-region database and cannot be cross-queried with other regions.

name: Audit Logs: Read-Only Even for Admin
description: Audit logs are append-only; no role may update or delete existing audit entries.
condition: UPDATE/DELETE blocked ON audit_logs FOR ALL ROLES

name: Revenue Valid Range: $0 to $1 Billion
description: Total revenue metric must fall between 0 and 1 billion USD.

name: Gross Margin Plausibility: -10% to 90%
description: Gross margin outside -10% to 90% is flagged as a data quality issue.

name: AOV Plausibility: $1 to $100,000
description: Average order values outside $1-$100,000 are statistical outliers and require review.

name: Customer Count Plausibility: Positive Integer
description: Customer count must be a positive integer; zero or negative indicates query error.

name: Churn Rate Plausibility: 0% to 100%
description: Churn rate must be between 0% and 100%.

name: Conversion Rate: 0 to 1
description: Conversion rate must be between 0 and 1 (inclusive).

name: Supplier Rating: 0 to 5
description: Supplier average rating must be between 0 and 5.

name: LTV Plausibility: Positive Value
description: Customer lifetime value must be a positive number.

name: Headcount Cannot Exceed Total Employee Table Count
description: Reported headcount must not exceed the total rows in the employees table.

name: Return Rate Plausibility: 0% to 50%
description: Return rates above 50% are flagged as anomalies requiring manual investigation.

name: MRR Cannot Decrease by More Than 20% Month-over-Month
description: A month-over-month MRR drop exceeding 20% triggers an alert for review.

name: Forecast Accuracy Must Exceed 70%
description: Forecast models with accuracy below 70% are flagged for retraining.

name: Pipeline Value Cannot Exceed 10x Trailing 12-Month Revenue
description: If pipeline value exceeds 10x T12M revenue, data may be inflated — flag for review.

name: DSO Plausibility: 0 to 180 Days
description: Days Sales Outstanding above 180 days indicates serious collection issues.

name: CSAT Score Range: 1 to 5
description: Customer satisfaction scores must fall between 1 and 5.

name: Win Rate Plausibility: 5% to 80%
description: Opportunity win rates outside 5%-80% are statistical outliers.

name: CAC Lower Bound: $1
description: Customer acquisition cost must be at least $1 to be meaningful.

name: Bounce Rate Plausibility: 0% to 100%
description: Bounce rate must be between 0% and 100%.

name: Warehouse Utilisation: 0% to 100%
description: Warehouse utilisation percentage must be between 0 and 100.

name: On-Time Delivery Rate: 0% to 100%
description: OTD rate must be between 0% and 100%.

name: Revenue Per Employee: Positive Value
description: Revenue per employee must be positive; negative value indicates reporting error.

name: NPS Range: -100 to +100
description: Net Promoter Score must fall between -100 and +100.

name: Session Duration: 0 to 4 Hours
description: Web session durations above 4 hours (14400 seconds) are likely bot traffic.

name: KPI Attainment Capped at 200% for Anomaly Detection
description: KPI attainment reported above 200% is flagged as a data anomaly.

name: Stockout Rate: 0% to 100%
description: Stockout rate must be between 0% and 100%.
